goal: Refactor transaction forms and account form to use shadcn/ui components, replacing all native HTML controls

tasks.name: Refactor transaction-form.tsx
microSteps: Replace <input type='date'> with DatePicker component (name='date')
Replace account <select> with Combobox (name='account_id', type-to-filter accounts)
Replace category <select> with Combobox (name='category_id', type-to-filter categories)
Replace type radio buttons with styled radio group using Button variant='outline'
Replace <input type='number'> (amount) with Input component
Replace <textarea> (notes) with Textarea component
Replace all <label> with Label component
Replace submit <button> with Button component
Preserve server action form submission pattern (FormData-based)
Verify edit mode still works (defaultValue for all fields)
Run type check and build

tdd.reason: UI component swap — same behavior, different rendering. Verified via type check, build, and manual testing.

tasks.action: Refactor the main transaction form. Replace all 8+ native HTML controls with shadcn/ui equivalents. Key mapping: <input type='date'> → DatePicker, <select> (account/category) → Combobox, radio buttons → styled Button toggle group, <input> → Input, <textarea> → Textarea, <label> → Label, <button> → Button. Preserve the server action form submission (FormData), edit mode with defaultValues, and all name attributes.

tasks.name: Refactor transaction-filters.tsx and quick-entry-sheet.tsx
microSteps: transaction-filters: Replace 2x <input type='date'> with DatePicker (from/to dates)
transaction-filters: Replace type <select> with Select component
transaction-filters: Replace account/category <select> with Combobox components
transaction-filters: Preserve URL-based navigation pattern (router.push with query params)
quick-entry-sheet: Replace account/category <select> with Combobox components
quick-entry-sheet: Replace amount <input> with Input component
quick-entry-sheet: Replace type toggle and submit button with Button components
quick-entry-sheet: Preserve quickCreateTransaction server action + toast pattern
Run type check and build

tdd.reason: UI component swap — verified via type check, build, and manual testing

tasks.action: Refactor transaction-filters (URL-based navigation, not FormData) and quick-entry-sheet (server action + toast). For filters: 2x date → DatePicker (using onChange callback instead of FormData), selects → Combobox/Select with onChange. For quick-entry: selects → Combobox, inputs → Input, buttons → Button. Preserve the body scroll lock, focus management, and toast behavior in quick-entry-sheet.

tasks.name: Refactor account-form.tsx and debt detail page inline form
microSteps: account-form: Replace type <select> with Select component (6 account types)
account-form: Replace name/balance <input> with Input component
account-form: Replace <label> with Label, <button> with Button
account-form: Preserve server action and edit mode defaultValues
debt detail page: Replace payment amount <input> with Input component
debt detail page: Replace account <select> with Select component (optional field)
debt detail page: Replace submit/delete <button> with Button component (preserve danger variant for delete)
Run type check and build

tdd.reason: UI component swap — verified via type check, build, and manual testing

tasks.action: Refactor account-form (3 controls: type select, name input, balance input) and the debt detail page inline forms (record payment form + delete form). account-form: type <select> → Select, inputs → Input, labels → Label, button → Button. Debt page: payment input → Input, account select → Select, buttons → Button (preserve red danger styling on delete button via variant='destructive').

commitMessage: feat(ui): refactor transaction, account, and debt detail forms to shadcn/ui components
